doc
Table of Contents

Namespace Blackjack_Class_Library

Classes

Blackjack

Represents a game of Blackjack, managing the state, player and dealer hands, betting, and game logic.

Card

Represents a playing card with a suit, rank, value, and identifier, and provides methods for creating and shuffling a standard deck.

CardCounter

Provides card counting functionality for a Blackjack game, maintaining running and true counts based on cards dealt to the player and dealer.

FrontEnd

Enums

BlackjackAction
BlackjackResult
BlackjackState
Rank
Suit
